title: Antenna violation detected
description: Antenna ratio exceeds foundry limit for a metal net, creating reliability risks during manufacturing.
investigation_checklist: Identify the offending net in the antenna report
Check net length and connected metal layers
Determine if net connects to long polysilicon segments
Evaluate if layer-jumping or metal routing improvements can reduce ratio
known_causes: Excessive metal area on a gate input
Insufficient routing resources causing long paths
Missing protection diodes for long metal nets
references: PDK Design Rules Manual - Antenna Rules
